unsafe_assumption: Shifting the observed obstacle point forward by the ellipse half-axis removed point-robot Minkowski footprint inflation from the local NMPC constraint.
phase5g_counterexample: The continuous crossing cart reached a swept yaw-aware footprint collision at step 99 while the candidate NMPC still allowed motion.
test_design_finding: The ego-relative center_stop schedule teleports an obstacle into footprint contact and is valid for perception STOP/GO scoring, not sequential SQP-RTI command equivalence. Near side obstacles also admit non-unique safe steering directions.
